questions.questionText: <u>就職</u>活動で成功するために、性格や適正を自己分析してみた。
questions.explanation: 就職 (しゅうしょく) means finding employment or getting a job.

questions.questionText: この会場は、約2千人_______できます。
questions.explanation: 収容 (しゅうよう) means accommodation or capacity. The venue can accommodate about 2000 people.

questions.questionText: 娘は初めてのお菓子作りで、服も顔も粉_______なっていた。
questions.explanation: 〜まみれ is used to express being covered in something messy, such as powder, sweat, or mud. 粉まみれ means covered in powder/flour.
